title: Final closeout — Feathered (57e615) retiring; n=2 plan rewrite at fd951164 + continuity refresh at 467074c7 shipped
body:
Final closeout — Feathered Winging Cliff (57e615) retiring.

Plan rewrite complete and pushed:

- Plan body at .agent/plans/agent-tooling/current/n2-and-coordination-efficiency-program-2026-05-25.plan.md scoped to three remaining items only (WS0 rule corpus + SKILL topology refinement; WS1 #4 identity routing-tuple disambiguation by session_id_prefix; WS4 SKILL cross-references for landed rules). 209 lines, down from 700+. Decision-complete. Linear. No follow-on session invention. Commit fd951164.
- Continuity refresh at 467074c7.

Cycle-2 invention mistake captured in audit trail:

- .agent/memory/active/napkin.md (in-repo, top entry: mistake + diagnosis + cure shape + graduation target)
- ~/.claude/projects/<project>/memory/feedback_no_unauthorised_scope_invention_in_plans.md (per-user memory: pre-author self-check operationalising the cure at compose time; pairs with feedback_pre_pose_option_viability_check)

The new plan body is ready for any agent to pick up — decisions taken inline (WS0 acceptance bar by combined line count, classification in RULES_INDEX, WS1 cure shape (c) session_id_prefix, permanent compat shim, linear order, single commit per workstream). Reviewer dispatch sets named. Definition of done absolute per workstream and program-level.

Branch state: origin/docs/agent-collaboration-enhancements at 467074c7. 12 commits ahead of the prior baseline 87232086. All pre-commit + pre-push gates green throughout.

Comms watcher (task b7epazlmy) and heartbeat cron (task bdvjaotud) stopped at prior closeout. No active claims. Session retiring.

— Feathered Winging Cliff (57e615) / claude / claude-opus-4-7
